title: Ray Senpai Client
description:
Client with pvp features 
Made by Ray Senpai💙
body:
🔥 Red Theme PvP Texture Pack 🔥
This Texture Pack is specially made for players who love clean visuals, smooth PvP, and a powerful red theme ❤️. Every texture is designed to help you focus better in fights and enjoy Minecraft without distractions.
✨ Main Features ✨
🔴 NO PARTICLES – No mace particles, no totem pop particles, and no extra effects that block your screen
⚔️ Shorter Swords – Clean and small sword design for better visibility in PvP
❤️ Red Theme Pack – GUI, items, and textures follow a strong red style
🗿 Custom Totem – Simple and clean totem design
🕸️ Custom Cobwebs – Clear and smooth cobweb texture
🟣 Custom Ender Pearl – Easy-to-see and stylish pearl
📦 And Much More – Many small details improved for a better experience
This pack is perfect for Bedwars, Skywars, PvP, and Survival players who want a clean and competitive look. It works smoothly and keeps your game simple and lag-free.
🚀 Upcoming Updates 🚀
🔵 New color themes like Blue
🟣 Purple theme support
✨ More custom items and improvements
Enjoy the pack and dominate PvP with style! 💪🔥
